```yaml
conditions:
- lastTransitionTime: string
  message: string
  reason: string
  status: string
  type: string
externalRef: string
observedGeneration: integer
observedState:
  androidSpecificAttributes:
    ctsProfileMatch: boolean
    enabledUnknownSources: boolean
    hasPotentiallyHarmfulApps: boolean
    ownerProfileAccount: boolean
    ownershipPrivilege: string
    supportsWorkProfile: boolean
    verifiedBoot: boolean
    verifyAppsEnabled: boolean
  basebandVersion: string
  bootloaderVersion: string
  brand: string
  buildNumber: string
  compromisedState: string
  createTime: string
  deviceID: string
  deviceType: string
  enabledDeveloperOptions: boolean
  enabledUsbDebugging: boolean
  encryptionState: string
  endpointVerificationSpecificAttributes:
    browserAttributes:
    - chromeBrowserInfo:
        browserManagementState: string
        browserVersion: string
        isBuiltInDNSClientEnabled: boolean
        isBulkDataEntryAnalysisEnabled: boolean
        isChromeCleanupEnabled: boolean
        isChromeRemoteDesktopAppBlocked: boolean
        isFileDownloadAnalysisEnabled: boolean
        isFileUploadAnalysisEnabled: boolean
        isRealtimeURLCheckEnabled: boolean
        isSecurityEventAnalysisEnabled: boolean
        isSiteIsolationEnabled: boolean
        isThirdPartyBlockingEnabled: boolean
        passwordProtectionWarningTrigger: string
        safeBrowsingProtectionLevel: string
      chromeProfileID: string
      lastProfileSyncTime: string
    certificateAttributes:
    - certificateTemplate:
        id: string
        majorVersion: integer
        minorVersion: integer
      fingerprint: string
      issuer: string
      serialNumber: string
      subject: string
      thumbprint: string
      validationState: string
      validityExpirationTime: string
      validityStartTime: string
  hostname: string
  imei: string
  kernelVersion: string
  lastSyncTime: string
  managementState: string
  manufacturer: string
  meid: string
  model: string
  networkOperator: string
  osVersion: string
  otherAccounts:
  - string
  ownerType: string
  releaseVersion: string
  securityPatchTime: string
  serialNumber: string
  unifiedDeviceID: string
  wifiMacAddresses:
  - string
```

        <td><code>observedState.kernelVersion</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Kernel version of the device.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.lastSyncTime</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Most recent time when device synced with this service.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.managementState</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Management state of the device</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.manufacturer</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Device manufacturer. Example: Motorola.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.meid</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. MEID number of device if CDMA device; empty otherwise.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.model</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Model name of device. Example: Pixel 3.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.networkOperator</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Mobile or network operator of device, if available.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.osVersion</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. OS version of the device. Example: Android 8.1.0.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.otherAccounts</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">list (string)</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Domain name for Google accounts on device.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.otherAccounts[]</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p></p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.ownerType</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Whether the device is owned by the company or an individual</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.releaseVersion</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. OS release version. Example: 6.0.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.securityPatchTime</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. OS security patch update time on device.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.serialNumber</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Serial Number of device. Example: HT82V1A01076.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.unifiedDeviceID</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Output only. Unified device id of the device.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.wifiMacAddresses</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">list (string)</code></p>
            <p>Output only. WiFi MAC addresses of device.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>observedState.wifiMacAddresses[]</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p></p>
        </td>
    </tr>
</tbody>
</table>
